# HireQuadrant

> HireQuadrant is a modern job board that connects candidates with employers who actually reply. Every application is screened, tracked, and acknowledged — no more black hole.

HireQuadrant is built for both sides of hiring:
- **Candidates** get AI-screened matches, saved searches with email alerts, a single dashboard for application tracking, and resume management
- **Employers** get configurable screening questions, AI-powered candidate screening with fit scores, a talent database, and a simple applicant pipeline

## Core pages

- [Home / Jobs](https://hirequadrant.com/): Primary job search with filters (keyword, location, type, salary)
- [Blog](https://hirequadrant.com/blog): Career resources covering resumes, interviews, hiring, and industry insights
- [Pricing](https://hirequadrant.com/pricing): Subscription tiers for companies (Free, Basic, Premium, Enterprise)
- [Register](https://hirequadrant.com/register): Sign up as a job seeker or employer (company/employer)
- [Login](https://hirequadrant.com/login): Sign in with email/password or Google SSO

## Job postings

Each job listing at `/jobs/:id` includes:
- Title, company, location, and salary range
- Full-text description with responsibilities and requirements
- Employment type (full-time, contract, part-time, internship)
- Google for Jobs JSON-LD structured data (JobPosting schema)
- Auto-detected skill and perk tags

## Aggregator-friendly XML feed

- [Jobs feed (XML)](https://npugrpsrgpyssupgxcxx.functions.supabase.co/jobs-feed-xml) — all active jobs in aggregator format for Indeed, Glassdoor, Jooble, Adzuna, and similar services.

## Key features

- AI job description generator (Anthropic Claude)
- AI candidate screening and fit scoring
- Screening questions (knockout & required) per job
- Saved jobs + job alert email digests (daily/weekly)
- Company reviews with aggregate star ratings
- Resume search for employers (company role required)
- Progressive Web App — installable on mobile

## Contact

- Site: https://hirequadrant.com
- Support: hello@hirequadrant.com

## Crawling

This site welcomes major LLM crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, OAI-SearchBot, anthropic-ai, Applebot-Extended, CCBot). Administrative routes are disallowed — see /robots.txt.
